title: Factory Tycoon
description: Economy system for factory mod packs. Includes JEI support, Jade support and market customization.
body:
**Adds player-run market structures and tycoon groups for buying/selling items — for factory and automation modpacks.**

## How to Get Started

1. Craft a **Market Compass** (surround a normal compass with iron bars) to locate the nearest market structure.
2. Explore to find a generated market building.
3. Enter the structure and use the **computer** (behind the iron door) to:
   - Create your own tycoon
   - Join an existing one
   - Manage members
   - Look at tycoon balance leaderboard. 

## Key Features

- **Market Structures** spawn with random types — each type buys and sells different items.
- **Customizable economy** — edit item values, add/remove items, or create entirely new market types via config. It's recommended to set processed/complex goods higher than their raw recipe costs to reward factories and processing chains.
- **Flexible structure integration** — add the `market interface` block plus input/output hatches to any custom structure; it will randomize its market type on spawn. Remember to add the structure names to the config so the Market Compass can find them.
- **JEI & Jade support** when looking at recipes for a item it shows markets its available in.
- **Alpha / Planned** showing markets items that can be sold in jei. working on player markets for selling items only.

## Configuration Tips

- Add your own structure names to the config so the Market Compass can find them.
- Set processed/complex goods higher than their raw recipe costs to reward factories and processing chains.

Made for modpacks with Create, Industrial Foregoing, Mekanism, or any heavy automation/industry focus.
